name: Double Eagle Indoor Golf
about: Double Eagle Indoor Golf is a membership-based facility focused on providing accessible golf simulation and swing analysis for golfers of all skill levels. The venue utilizes Uneekor Eye XO launch monitors to provide detailed club and ball data, allowing members to analyze their swings and play on over 150,000 virtual courses. It operates on a no-contract, monthly membership model with options ranging from basic to premier access. The facility is designed as a dedicated training environment for improving one's game in a private, comfortable setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Uneekor Eye XO launch monitor technology
24/7 availability with flexible monthly membership options
Over 150,000 virtual courses for practice and play
Comprehensive swing data analysis for game improvement
Inclusive weekly group clinics with Leonard Hermosillo

food_and_drink.notes: No food is served or available for purchase on-site.
No alcohol is served or available for purchase on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Track swing and ball data; automatic tee systems in most bays.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members must bring their own golf clubs to use the simulators and hitting bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, Double Eagle Indoor Golf does not allow outside food or drink. The facility does not serve or sell any food or alcohol.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time can vary depending on the number of players and pace of play, as members can use the bays for as long as they want with their reservation, or indefinitely with a Premier membership.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, family members under the age of 18 are welcome with a member at any time. Children must be supervised at all times to ensure safety and respect for other members.
